methods.description: This method integrates analyses of meta-omics data to predict potential biotic interactions, reveal niche spaces, and guide focused studies on possible relations and roles of compounds in bacteria-diatom communities.

methods.description: This approach reconstructs community biodiversity by tracking microorganisms' functional traits to infer ecosystem functioning.
